mapper.select: SELECT u.*, d.name as dept_name FROM sys_user u LEFT JOIN department d ON u.dept_id = d.id ORDER BY u.id
SELECT u.*, d.name as dept_name FROM sys_user u LEFT JOIN department d ON u.dept_id = d.id ORDER BY u.id LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT u.*, d.name as dept_name FROM sys_user u LEFT JOIN department d ON u.dept_id = d.id WHERE u.id = #{id}
SELECT u.*, d.name as dept_name FROM sys_user u LEFT JOIN department d ON u.dept_id = d.id WHERE u.username = #{username}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sys_user (username, password, real_name, email, phone, dept_id, position, role, status) VALUES (#{username}, #{password}, #{realName}, #{email}, #{phone}, #{deptId}, #{position}, #{role}, #{status})
